name: education-claim-audit
description: Engineer-audit education/credential marketing (accreditation, degrees, board pathways) — not educational advice

steps.text: Treat school marketing as sales copy. Guilty of framing until primary accreditor/state/board registers verify.

steps.goal: Using skill education-claim-audit and knowledge/education/ (especially lpu-credential-claims.md if present), audit Lifestyle Prescriptions University / similar education marketing. Cover entity, who issues degrees, ASIC vs regional accreditation, Wyoming license, EIU-Paris validation, NBHWC, IBLM pending vs homepage, funding claims. Do not invent approvals. Not educational or medical advice.
criteria: Verdict label correct (Insufficient evidence / Marketing only / Partially verified / Red flags)
Who issues the diploma distinguished from brand marketing
Accreditation types mapped (operate license vs institutional vs validation vs CE)
IBLM or other board pending vs approved inconsistency called out if present
Next verification steps name specific primary sources
One concrete risk of trusting the page as-is
No recommendation to enroll as 'safe' or 'regionally equivalent' without evidence
